inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age affects basal metabolic rate (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects basal metabolic rate (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş, yağsız vücut kütlesi ve hormonal faktörlerdeki değişiklikler nedeniyle bazal metabolizma hızını (BMR) etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter beeinflusst den Grundumsatz (BMR) aufgrund von Veränderungen der fettfreien Körpermasse und hormonellen Faktoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'âge affecte le métabolisme de base en raison des changements de masse maigre et des facteurs hormonaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad afecta la tasa metabólica basal (TMB) debido a cambios en la masa corporal magra y factores hormonales.

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: Gender influences BMR through differences in body composition and hormonal profiles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gender influences BMR through differences in body composition and hormonal profiles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cinsiyet, vücut kompozisyonu ve hormonal profillerdeki farklılıklar yoluyla BMR'yi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschlecht beeinflusst den Grundumsatz durch Unterschiede in der Körperzusammensetzung und den Hormonprofilen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le sexe influence le métabolisme de base via les différences de composition corporelle et de profils hormonaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: El género influye en la TMB a través de diferencias en la composición corporal y perfiles hormonales.

inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight is a primary driver of energy expenditure and calorie needs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight is a primary driver of energy expenditure and calorie needs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığı, enerji harcaması ve kalori ihtiyacının birincil itici gücüdür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht ist ein Haupttreiber des Energieverbrauchs und des Kalorienbedarfs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids corporel est un moteur principal de la dépense énergétique et des besoins caloriques.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso corporal es un factor principal del gasto energético y las necesidades calóricas.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Height is used in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height is used in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boy, BMR denklemlerinde yağsız vücut kütlesini ve metabolizma hızını tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße wird in BMR-Gleichungen verwendet, um die fettfreie Körpermasse und den Stoffwechsel zu schätzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La taille est utilisée dans les équations du métabolisme de base pour estimer la masse maigre et le taux métabolique.
businessContext_i18n.es: La altura se utiliza en las ecuaciones de TMB para estimar la masa corporal magra y la tasa metabólica.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel aktivite çarpanı, mesleki ve egzersiz alışkanlıklarına göre toplam günlük enerji harcamasını ayarlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Multiplikator für körperliche Aktivität passt den Gesamtenergieumsatz basierend auf beruflichen und sportlichen Gewohnheiten an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le multiplicateur d'activité physique ajuste la dépense énergétique totale en fonction des habitudes professionnelles et d'exercice.
businessContext_i18n.es: El multiplicador de actividad física ajusta el TDEE según los hábitos ocupacionales y de ejercicio.

inputs.label: Weight Loss Rate
inputs.businessContext: Desired weekly weight loss rate determines the daily calorie deficit target.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired weekly weight loss rate determines the daily calorie deficit target.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen haftalık kilo verme hızı, günlük kalori açığı hedefini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gewünschte wöchentliche Gewichtsverlustrate bestimmt das tägliche Kaloriendefizitziel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le taux de perte de poids hebdomadaire souhaité détermine le déficit calorique quotidien cible.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de pérdida de peso semanal deseada determina el objetivo de déficit calórico diario.

inputs.label: Body Fat Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Optional input for more accurate BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional input for more accurate BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katch-McArdle formülü kullanılarak daha doğru BMR tahmini için isteğe bağlı girdi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Eingabe für eine genauere BMR-Schätzung mit der Katch-McArdle-Formel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrée facultative pour une estimation plus précise du métabolisme de base à l'aide de la formule de Katch-McArdle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entrada opcional para una estimación más precisa de la TMB usando la fórmula de Katch-McArdle.

inputs.label: Pregnant
inputs.businessContext: Pregnancy increases energy requirements; deficit is not recommended during pregnancy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pregnancy increases energy requirements; deficit is not recommended during pregnancy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hamilelik enerji gereksinimlerini artırır; hamilelik sırasında kalori açığı önerilmez.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schwangerschaft erhöht den Energiebedarf; ein Kaloriendefizit wird während der Schwangerschaft nicht empfohlen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La grossesse augmente les besoins énergétiques ; un déficit n'est pas recommandé pendant la grossesse.
businessContext_i18n.es: El embarazo aumenta los requerimientos energéticos; no se recomienda un déficit durante el embarazo.

rules.action: set goalRate to 'slow' and warn user that deficit is not recommended during pregnancy
add 500 kcal to TDEE before calculating deficit
fallback to Mifflin-St Jeor BMR formula
ensure deficit <= 1000 kcal/day and warn if weight < 60 kg

thresholds.alert: Daily deficit exceeds 1000 kcal. Risk of muscle loss, nutrient deficiency, and metabolic slowdown.
Calorie intake is below minimum safe levels. Consult a healthcare professional.
BMI indicates underweight. Weight loss is not recommended.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
